name: Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu (OYSTER BAY HOTEL VUNG TAU)
address: 82B Trần Phú, Phường 5, Phường 5, Vũng Tàu, Việt Nam
description:
Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu

Tham quan nhiều hơn ở những vùng lân cận nổi tiếng của Vũng Tàu khi ở lại Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu. Thưởng thức lịch sử và vẻ đẹp của Vũng Tàu bằng cách ghé thăm một trong nhiều di tích quanh thành phố. Quý khách đang tìm kiếm nhiều lựa chọn? Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu cho quý khách tha hồ lựa chọn các hoạt động, với vị trí thuận lợi cách Hải đăng Vũng Tàu chỉ 3,6 km.
Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu cung cấp một loạt dịch vụ và tiện nghi để giúp kỳ nghỉ của quý khách thoải mái hơn. Giữ liên lạc trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của quý khách với việc được truy cập internet miễn phí.
Khách có thể đỗ xe miễn phí ngay tại khách sạn. Khách sạn cung cấp các dịch vụ quầy lễ tân như két sắt và giữ hành lý để tạo sự thuận tiện cho khách. Có thể đóng gói đồ đạc nhẹ nhàng tại Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu nhờ việcdịch vụ giặt là của khách sạn giữ cho quần áo của quý khách luôn sạch sẽ. Cảm thấy không muốn làm gì? Các dịch vụ có sẵn như dịch vụ tại phòng giúp quý khách tận dụng tối đa thời gian của mình tại Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu.
Khách sạn cấm hút thuốc hoàn toàn.
Cảm giác như ở nhà trong thời gian quý khách ở lại Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là và điều hòa trong một số phòng vì lợi ích của khách.
Các phòng được thiết kế đặc biệt tại Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu cung cấp lựa chọn bố trí như ban công hoặc sân hiên. Giải trí trong phòng như ti-vi được cung cấp cho khách trong các phòng chọn lọc.
Khách sạn cũng cung cấp tủ lạnh nhỏ chứa đồ uống và tủ lạnh trong một số phòng khi quý khách thấy cần. Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu cũng cung cấp áo choàng tắm, máy sấy tóc và vật dụng tắm rửa trong phòng tắm cho các phòng chọn lọc.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Bắt đầu những ngày nghỉ của quý khách theo cách tốt nhất có thể. Buổi sáng của quý khách bắt đầu bằng bữa sáng tại chỗ. Một số lựa chọn ăn uống tuyệt vời tại khách sạn đảm bảo rằng quý khách sẽ luôn có những lựa chọn thuận tiện và ngon miệng.
Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu hứa hẹn mang đến cho quý khách một kỳ nghỉ vui vẻ với nhiều hoạt động và cơ sở vật chất. Nhấm nháp ly cocktail yêu thích của quý khách ngoài trời tại quầy bar bên bể bơi của khách sạn.

sample_comments.text: Chỗ nghỉ có vị trí thuận tiện, sạch sẽ và nhân viên thân thiện, tạo cảm giác thoải mái ngay từ lần đầu. Tiện nghi hiện đại với nước nóng và phòng tắm sạch sẽ giúp giấc ngủ ngon hơn. Bữa sáng đa dạng và gần các khu mua sắm, rất đáng giá cho chi phí bỏ ra.
sample_comments.title: Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời và rất tiện nghi

sample_comments.title: Chuyến đi tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Nhân viên tận tình, chu đáo, lễ tân nhiệt tình, vui vẻ, hỗ trợ khách hết mình

sample_comments.text: Nhìn chung mọi thứ tương đối tốt, vị trí ks gần biển nên khá tiện đi tắm biển, nhân viên rất nhiệt tình và hỗ trợ, thậm chí hỗ trợ mình check in sớm hơn 2 tiếng và check out trễ 1 tiếng, rất hài lòng về dịch vụ, đặc biệt là các bạn lễ tân trực ngày 15/4, thật sự rất tuyệt vời, các bạn hỗ trợ rất nhiệt tình, cảm ơn các bạn. Phòng ks sạch sẽ, đầy đủ các vật tư sử dụng, khăn tắm không bị mùi chua như các ks khác mình từng ở ( mặc dù các ks khác cao cấp và đắt hơn rất rất nhiều), ngoài ra ks còn có view rất đẹp. Bữa sáng buffet rất ngon TUY NHIÊN mình khá không hài lòng về cô đứng quầy bánh canh của ks, vài lần trước thì thái độ của cô mặc dù không bằng các bạn nhân viên khác tuy nhiên vẫn chấp nhận được, nhưng lần này thì thái độ của cô khá khó chịu, không biết cô có chuyện gì nhưng luôn tỏ ra khó chịu, không nói, không cười, mình lại nhờ cô múc giúp 1 tô bánh canh và trụng rau cô lườm mình và tỏ thái độ khó chịu. Còn lại các bạn nhân viên phục vụ rất tốt, rất hài lòng. Phòng tắm của ks nên lắp thêm rèm ngăn nước cho bồn tắm để nước đỡ văng ra ngoài.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách hàng,
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý Khách đã dành thời gian quý báu của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. Khách Sạn rất vui mừng khi biết Quý Khách đã có một kỳ nghỉ / chuyến công tác tuyệt vời cùng Gia Đình, Bạn Bè và Người Thân.
Những phản hồi tích cực của Quý Khách chính là nguồn động lực to lớn để toàn thể đội ngũ nhân viên của Khách Sạn tiếp tục duy trì và mang đến chất lượng dịch vụ xuất sắc hơn nữa. Khách Sạn rất mong sớm có cơ hội được chào đón Quý Khách quay trở lại trong tương lai gần.
Trân trọng !

Dear Ms.Ngan,

Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu rất vinh dự được tiếp đón gia đình quý khách. Chúng tôi luôn cố gắng để phòng, dịch vụ, và thức ăn luôn có chất lượng cao nhất, mang lại sự hài lòng cho quý khách trong thời gian lưu trú tại đây.

Khách sạn Oyster Bay Hotel Vũng Tàu

sample_comments.negatives: Everingthing

sample_comments.title: Terrible Hotel
sample_comments.text: Reservations were accepted, but no services were available here.

sample_comments.title: Beware and Avoid - Poor Hygiene, Extremely Poor Customer Service & Deceptive
sample_comments.negatives:
I do not recommend staying at Oyster Bay Hotel in Vung Tau.

The shower flooded daily and required repeated maintenance calls. The room was unclean, and room service requests were completely ignored throughout our stay. After eating the buffet breakfast, I experienced food poisoning. The food selection was also limited and not vegan-friendly. The gym is extremely small and does not resemble the photos on the hotel's website.

Check-in took nearly two hours, with a young child and an elderly family member with an injury, with no acknowledgement or apology from staff.

The most serious issue was the handling of our departure and refund. After a lengthy discussion (using our precious vacation time) with the hotel manager about the problems we experienced, she verbally agreed to refund 2 nights and confirmed that an evening checkout was acceptable, with no fees or conditions mentioned. The hotel has since reversed both commitments entirely. It's been about 3 weeks now and no refund has been issued. When challenged, they introduced details that were never communicated at the time and have since gone silent.

Every attempt to resolve this has been met with evasion. The pattern of verbal assurances that are later denied, combined with an unresolved overcharge, points to dishonest business practices. Save yourself the trouble and stay elsewhere.

sample_comments.title: Te hai
sample_comments.text: Dich vu te hai, bo phan dat phong quan lieu

sample_comments.title: The room was quite clean and nice, but the water in the sink stayed clogged and wouldn't drain, even
sample_comments.positives: Food often runs out or is limited because there are too many people, it's hard to find a table, and there's a lack of staff assistance.
sample_comments.negatives: There's no one to help with luggage, even during check-in...

sample_comments.title: Food poisoning at the 'free breakfast'
sample_comments.text:
Unfortunately me and my partner got extreme food poisoning after we ate breakfast the 2nd day of our stay.
We puked multiple times and it ruined our trip completely, we're still recovering a few days later now that we're back in HCMC.
I wish I wouldn't touch the breakfast because the rest of the stay was pretty OK, but not really worth too much as the closest beach was 2KM away, and not right under as I assumed paying this price.

All-in-all, wouldn't stay here.

sample_comments.title: Not coming back
sample_comments.positives: Càng think of any
sample_comments.negatives: Food is not good, too noisy and hard to find a table for breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Not worth the time and money
sample_comments.text: Arrived at the hotel around 4pm and waited for over an hour to check-in. We booked two rooms and were told only 1 room is ready and we have to wait 30mins for the other room to be ready. Waited for an hour no update so we went out for dinner. Came back and asked for room card, they finally found a room after 20mins' wait. Went to the room and found it very dirty with bad smell in the toilet. I had to buy a bunch of antibacterial wipes from pharmacy to clean it up because it was late and there was no cleaning service. Finally took a shower to find the drain to be clogged. The toilet floor was flooded. The hotel sent a repair guy, took 2mins to say everything is fix. Now on day 2, the shower is still flooded after shower. This is the worst experience I have had so far while holidaying in Vietnam. I will never return to this place. I requested for room change to be told that they are fully booked. I then requested to checkout early for a refund for the remaining stay which they refused. Do not stay here at any cost. I only booked this place because it was rated 4-star with previous good reviews. Not worth the time and money.

sample_comments.negatives: TV didn't work very good

sample_comments.title: Acceptable

Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for choosing us during your visit to Vung Tau City.

We would like to thank you for your review. Thank you very much for taking the time to give us your feedback. I have noted down and shared your comments with the Foods & Beverages Department so we can look into this further to ensure our services meet our guests' expectations.

We humbly apologize for any inconvenience to you . Your comments give us the opportunity to improve our service and I hope we have the chance to serve you better at Oyster Bay Vung Tau during the next trip. 

With my best regards, 
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.negatives: Lacking in facilities

sample_comments.title: Inaccurate Information about room size
sample_comments.text: I have booked a room (deluxe room with sea view and a large king bed) and when I checked in, they gave me a room smaller than the information on the website (24m2 compared to 40m2 on website, and a queen bed). I complained and they gave me another room about 26m2. And they still do not give me the reason for the differences from the inaccurate information. So now, I feel so irritating at midnight about this experience.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Staff very polite and helpful

sample_comments.title: A terrible experience!
sample_comments.text: Front staff was rude and reluctant to serve. One of my family member was sick and we requested for some painkiller as the temp. hit 39 - 40oC from the first aid box at about 2am. Staff was sleeping on the sofa and after a few attempts, finally woke up and told us they don't have any. Told us to call an ambulance or take transport to town and get some. Told staff to arrange for us, but was told there's no transportation at that time. Suggested to use wet towel and cool down till the next morning. Went down and make a big fuss and finally got us some painkillers. Pool was dirty, buffet breakfast was ok for the first night but turned out to be ala carte order on the second day. So, no buffet breakfast despite paying the price for it. Not anymore! Byebye.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Saubere, gut ausgestattetes Zimmer mit direktem Blick auf das Meer, eine weit entfernte Reede und die Schiffsbewegungen im Fahrwasser. Balkon gut zu nutzen. Frühstücksraum im 16 Stock mit Blick auf das Meer. Gut Platz zwischen den Tischen. Gutes Buffett, asiatisch aber auch mit Käse und Wurst. Frisch zubereitete Eier auf Kundenwunsch.
sample_comments.negatives: Der Kaffee beim Frühstück war leider nicht Western-Style, sondern bitter-vietnamesisch. Kein Kaffeeautomat für Spezialitäten. Es fehl ein großer Ganzkörperspiegel im Zimmer.

Overall great stay, will visit there again.

sample_comments.title: Tạm được!
sample_comments.positives: Kiến trúc bên ngoài nhìn rất ấn tượng, thu hút mỗi khi đi ngang công trình này.
sample_comments.negatives: Các tiện ích, nội thất trong phòng chưa tương xứng với khách sạn 4 sao. Hong có welcome drink luôn. Nội thất phòng nghỉ cắt nhiều quá chưa tương xứng khách sạn 4 sao, thiết kế tủ treo quần áo rất tệ. Tủ quần áo sử dụng cửa lùa nên mất diện tích tủ không thể treo móc quần áo như bình thường được, rất dễ kẹt ( dập ) tay trẻ em không để ý khi đóng mở tủ. Cửa ra vào chưa cách âm đúng chuẩn nên vẫn còn lọt tiếng ồn từ ngoài hành lan vào trong phòng. Phòng Vệ Sinh thiếu gương cạo râu. Tiện ích hồ bơi bé tẹo khác xa với hình ảnh trên booking . Buffet sáng ở khách sạn 4 tệ ( tại quảng cáo Ks 4 sao nên mới chê tệ vì chưa tương xứng ).Mong ks cải thiện hơn để xứng với khách sạn 4 .

sample_comments.title: Nhân viên thiếu chuyên nghiệp
sample_comments.text:
Mình gặp 4 vấn đề. 
1. Mình book dạng đặt trước thanh toán sau. App báo là 16/7 sẽ thanh toán, nhưng 14/7 thì mình đã bị trừ tiền. 
2. Mình tới KS lúc 13:00, mình check in nhận phòng, nhưng mình dc bạn lễ tân mang bảng giá ra hỏi thăm muốn nâng cấp phòng ko và báo giá lần 1 là 300k ( thay vì 500k như thường lệ). Mình từ chối, thì lần 2 bạn đó vẫn quay lại và hỏi thêm mình lần nữa là mình nâng cấp phòng ko vì bạn đó xin dc quản lý giá nâng cấp chỉ 200k.(???) phòng nâng cấp sẽ là tầng cao hơn, view đẹp hơn, nhưng mình đã nói mình ko cần. Rồi mình mới thắc mắc, thật sự phòng mình đặt có vâsn đề gì hay ko sao bên này cứ kiên quyết vụ nâng cấp phòng, dù khách đã nói rõ ko có nhu cầu. Bạn lễ tân vẫn nói sẽ hỏi lại quản lý để xin miễn phí nâng cấp phòng cho mình. Và chưa tới 1p bạn đó đã quay lại nói quane lý đã đồng ý nâng cấp phòng miễn phí và kêu mình đánh giá tốt cho ks họ??????? Chưa kể đến việc cô lễ tân này cứ mải miết báo giá nâng cấp phòng cho mình, cũng ko thèm hướng dẫn về ăn sáng ở tầng mấy mấy giờ, pass wifi là gi. Chán ko buồn nói
3. Lúc 21:00 đêm chuông báo cháy inh ỏi rất nhiều lần, alo hỏi lễ tân bảo là tầng 1 đang test phòng cháy chữa cháy????? (Chính xác khi đó là 21:14 và KS test phòng cháy chữa cháy)
4. Thức ăn sáng chấp nhận đc, ko đa dạng. 
Bỏ hết những vde ở trên, đây là KS mới và nếu giá tốt vẫn tạm ở đc. Còn giá cao thôi miễn quay lại

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text:
I would like to give 2 stars for the reception desk and the security staff because everyone was very enthusiastic, helping me check in early, and the room view of the pool was lovely. The rest was very poor. 
First, the lobby waiting area near the elevator was very unpleasant; I'm not sure what the smell was, but both my friend and I noticed it, and the elevator was slow. 
Second, I don't know if the bar is managed by the hotel or not, but that afternoon I ordered 2 cocktails, and I'm not sure if the staff who took the order had an issue or was upset about previous guests, but they completely ignored us and took our order with an extremely unpleasant attitude. 
Third, after checking in, I went to the bathroom, and when I plugged in the hairdryer, there was a power outage. I called the staff to fix it. The next day, I woke up at 4 AM to catch the sunrise, and when I plugged in the hairdryer again, it lost power. I called the reception, and a staff member came up to fix it, saying that the socket was damp and asking if we had used that socket or plugged in a kettle, implying that it was our fault for making the socket damp. Meanwhile, we hadn't stayed in the hotel much or used that socket at all. 
Fourth, this is what upset me the most. When I went for breakfast, it was quite crowded, and since I came on the weekend, I could understand it, but when my friend and I asked the staff if there were any available tables, it was as if we were invisible. When I became quite frustrated and asked another staff member, they said to take our food to the pool area, but I informed them that there was no space there either. That staff member then said for us to find a table with extra chairs and just sit down, then walked away. I was like, huh? I also paid the same amount as everyone else to have an okay service experience; I don't understand how the staff at such a large hotel can lack this kind of professional knowledge. 
Honestly, with that amount of money, I could have chosen another hotel with much better service. I hope the hotel can improve!

sample_comments.title: Nice view but needs better cleanliness
sample_comments.text:
The staff were okay and generally helpful. The highlight of the stay is definitely the view - both the room and the pool have a really nice sea view, which I enjoyed a lot.

However, cleanliness needs improvement. The pillows had visible stains, the shower looked old and had mould, and the drainage was slow, making it inconvenient to use. The tumblers also didn't feel properly clean.

Breakfast was decent, nothing special but acceptable.

Overall, the view is great, but hygiene and maintenance should be improved to match the price.

sample_comments.title: Experience at Oysterbay
sample_comments.text:
I have a 2-day, 2-night trip at Oyster. 
Service: 10 points, the receptionist speaks gently, upon arrival there are bellboys running to the luggage gate, with a welcome drink, very enthusiastic. 
Food: 5 points, breakfast has a variety of dishes but not very tasty. 
Room: 3 points, new, bright, but a downside, there were mites or something in the bedding, woke up with a few red spots on my skin, itchy, the room is not soundproof, conversations from people in the hallway can be heard very clearly in the room, room design is not reasonable, there is no shower for standing or washing hair, the owner has a bathtub, no place to hang clothes in the bathroom. 
Outdoor space: 8 points, there is a courtyard in front of the room to breathe the morning air, exercise, HOWEVER, it is not very private when the courtyard of the rooms connects with each other.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms.Truc,

Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu rất vinh dự được tiếp đón gia đình quý khách. Chúng tôi xin lỗi vì quý khách đã có một trải nghiệm không tốt khi ở tại khách sạn của chúng tôi. sample_comments.title: The swimming pool needs to install a hot water system.
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is fine except for the following points:
1. The bellboy is not present for evening check-in.
2. The room had a slight sewage smell but was addressed the next day.
3. The toilet spray water pressure is weak.
4. The pool does not have hot water, swimming in cold water is uncomfortable because it's windy on the rooftop even when swimming at noon.
5. Dining services at the restaurant or pool do not charge to the room, which is a bit inconvenient as you have to carry cash and cards.
6. The beach in front of the hotel is not swimmable; you have to ride a motorbike for 5 minutes to get to another beach for swimming.

sample_comments.title: Good hotel
sample_comments.text:
From the moment we arrived at Oyster Bay, our stay was nothing short of exceptional. The check-in process was smooth and efficient, and we were immediately captivated by the elegant and welcoming ambiance of the lobby.
Our room was simply stunning---spacious, immaculately clean, and beautifully appointed, it offered every comfort imaginable. But the true highlight was the incredible sea view.
Beyond the facilities, it was the staff who truly made our stay so special. Every member of the team, from the friendly front desk staff to the attentive housekeeping staff and the professional restaurant servers, was genuinely eager to please. Their warm hospitality made us feel truly valued and cared for.
The hotel's location is also good, offering easy access to numerous coffee shops, restaurants, and the best restaurant in Vung Tau, Ganh Hao, where my wife and I always enjoy lunch or dinner whenever we visit.

sample_comments.title: Good Choice for a Quiet Stay, but Not for Luxury Seekers
sample_comments.text:
I booked a deluxe sea-view room, and while the room itself was spacious and comfortable, the bathroom was a disappointment---it was very small and lacked a proper shower enclosure, which could be inconvenient for some guests.

At this price point, the breakfast options fell short of expectations. Instead of relying on the hotel's offerings, I would highly recommend exploring local Vung Tau specialties for a more satisfying experience.

The location is somewhat isolated, far from the city center and the nearest beach. However, if you have your own vehicle (car or motorbike), the distance becomes less of an issue, and the peaceful surroundings might even add to the charm.

The staff provided a mixed experience. Some members were genuinely attentive and helpful, ensuring a warm and welcoming stay. However, others seemed less accommodating, which at times detracted from the overall service quality. Consistency in customer service would certainly improve the guest experience.

One notable downside was the rooftop pool, which during our December visit was uncomfortably cold due to the lack of a heating system. This could be a letdown for those hoping to enjoy a swim during cooler months.

In summary, I would recommend this hotel for travelers who primarily want a comfortable place to sleep and aren't planning to use many hotel facilities. It's a quiet retreat with decent rooms, but those seeking a luxurious, full-service experience with top-notch amenities should consider other options.

Những phản hồi tích cực của Quý Khách chính là nguồn động lực to lớn để toàn thể đội ngũ nhân viên của Khách Sạn tiếp tục duy trì và mang đến chất lượng dịch vụ xuất sắc hơn nữa. Khách Sạn rất mong sớm có cơ hội được chào đón Quý Khách quay trở lại trong tương lai gần.

Thank you for staying with us and give a perfect score. It gives us great pleasure to know that you thoroughly enjoyed your overall experience. We are all looking forward to welcoming you back in Oyster Bay Vung Tau.

Beside that, We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced due to the slow elevator service and the long wait time.
We understand how frustrating this must have been, and we truly appreciate your patience. Please rest assured that we are currently looking into the issue with our maintenance team to ensure the elevators are operating efficiently and any delays are minimized.

Kind Regards,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.title: Bad Experience in Vung Tau
sample_comments.negatives: Over Expensive, no wifi at the hotel, no complimentary beverage, staff cannot communicate, no access to beach from the hotel, Will not recommend. also after telling them about my preference for food they could not include it in the breakfast. With the price I paid at this hotel there are a lot of other better options.

sample_comments.title: Worth the money
sample_comments.text: I stayed on the 15th-16th. I booked a superior sea view room. However, the room I received did not have a standing shower at all. Additionally, regarding the bathroom curtain, I pulled it down, but people outside could still see clearly :))). I had to turn off all the lights in the bathroom to feel safe when showering and doing my hygiene. It was very inconvenient and made me feel uncomfortable. That is something I rate poorly. If this feature is available or not, it should be clearly noted. The staff was friendly and supported guests 1000%. The breakfast was diverse, tasty, filling, and clean. The food was always full. Next time I stay, I will pay more attention to the bathroom.
sample_comments.response:
Thân gửi Quý khách,

Trước hết, chúng tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành đến quý khách và gia đình vì đã lựa chọn Oyster Bay Vung Tau trong chuyến nghỉ dưỡng vừa qua. Chúng tôi vô cùng cảm ơn những đóng góp mang tính xây dựng cũng như những lời khen về nhân viên tại khách sạn. Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng xin lỗi vì những bất tiện đã xảy ra trong thời gian quý khách lưu trú tại khách sạn với trải nghiệm tại phòng nghỉ.

Tại Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu, chúng tôi mong muốn tạo ra những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ cho tất cả khách hàng bằng cách cung cấp dịch vụ chăm sóc khách hàng tốt nhất và đảm bảo đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của Khách. Hỗ trợ khách hàng một cách hiệu quả, mọi lúc là một trong những ưu tiên hàng đầu của chúng tôi. Chúng tôi chắc chắn rằng phản hồi của quý khách đã được ghi nhận và chia sẻ với bộ phận phụ trách liên quan để cùng nhau xem xét kỹ hơn và cải thiện chúng trong tương lai.

Một lần nữa xin chân thành xin lỗi vì mọi bất tiện đã gây ra cho quý khách và gia đình mình trong quá trình lư

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Not too good
sample_comments.negatives: Staff

sample_comments.title: A nice hideaway
sample_comments.text:
We booked the garden view rooms but could see the sea from the balcony. Quiet night and good sleep; excellent staff.
The hotel is new, with many cafes and restaurants nearby. Buffet was included, food was decent. Price for an a la carte meal was reasonable. Didn't order drinks from the bar but the view from the bar and swimming pool was pleasant. 
Will stay there again.

sample_comments.title: Reasonable price for reasonable hotel
sample_comments.positives:
Rooftop bar and pool very relaxing
Good restaurants within walking distance. Staff pleasant.
sample_comments.negatives: Rubbish left in public area bins for days so Very smelly near the lifts. Plastic chairs on the pool deck were very dangerous and not sturdy. They collapsed numerous times with people on them. Strange open bedroom on our floor for two days with discarded towels and rubbish.

sample_comments.title: Excellent experience
sample_comments.text: Stayed with my big family with 6 children in the group. Good services, friendly staffs, upgraded our rooms without additional charges.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: The room was quite spacious and the bed really comfy...wifi worked a treat. Breakfast eas ample with a lot of choices available.. I had dinner one night and it was quite tasty as well.
sample_comments.negatives: Not all elevators went to the rooftop where the dining room was located, so it could take some time to get the right elevator. Bit overpriced for my liking. A table and chair on the balcony would be nice so you can sit outside in that large space.

sample_comments.title: Nice Pool but Poor breakfast...
sample_comments.text:
Unfortunately, although the Hotel has a nice pool with a nice view but the poor breakfast dampened my expectations for the 2 day stay here.

A good breakfast is also a plus for hotels to compete each other for returning customers. Your guys know the meaning, right?
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Mrs. Thị,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your stay at Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. I am very sorry that your experience at our hotel did not meet your expectations; please accept my sincere apologies.

At Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau, we strive to provide an outstanding service experience for all our guests; therefore, your feedback is extremely important to us. Please be assured that we are taking appropriate measures to address the issues and prevent them from occurring in the future.

We appreciate that you have shared with us the aspects where you were dissatisfied, and we sincerely hope you will give us the opportunity to serve you better in the near future.

Best regards,
Customer Service Department

sample_comments.negatives: Breakfast buffet not good enough. Need improve

I will definitely come back

sample_comments.negatives:

sample_comments.title: Great staffs
sample_comments.text:
Staffs were extremely helpful and friendly, I had a problem with the booking but they tried their best to help me solve it. 
Room is good and is as advertised, you get what you see.
Location is decent, directly in front of the hotel is a cafe by the beach, but you can't swim there, you will need to ride a bike for roughly 2mins to get to Bai Dau beach for swimming.
Rooftop pool + bar is ok, though the pool closes a quite bit early (6pm), while the bar still functions until 11pm.
Gym here is just for decoration, 4 running machines and that's it, a pretty joke to me.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Perfect

sample_comments.title: Best cost performance.
sample_comments.text: I stayed for three nights from January 7th to 10th. The breakfast was good, the room was spacious and clean, and they provided six towels. In January, it's too cold to swim, so I like places like this instead of resorts. It's high up, so it's nice to go up and watch the boats passing by in the sea while zoning out. It was also cool enough to sleep with the windows open, so I didn't need to use the air conditioning. The air conditioning is also an LG latest model system. The WiFi has some speed limitations, but it is comfortable. The staff is all very friendly. The best part was enjoying breakfast leisurely while looking at the sea view (the view from the breakfast area is the best). It's a bit far from the city, but that makes it quiet and peaceful, which I liked.
sample_comments.response:
상배, 고객님께,

저희 Oyster Bay Hotel Vung tau 에서의 소중한 시간과 따뜻한 말씀을 보내주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 고객님께서 저희와 함께해 주신 시간에 만족하셨다는 소식을 듣고 매우 기쁩니다.

고객님의 소중한 피드백은 저희 전 팀에게 큰 동기가 되며, 앞으로도 한층 더 우수한 서비스를 제공하기 위해 최선을 다하겠습니다. 가까운 시일 내에 다시 모시게 되기를 고대합니다.

감사드립니다.

프런트 오피스 매니저 드림!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional Stay at a Hidden Gem!
sample_comments.text:
If you're looking for a nice and affordable place to stay, this hotel is a total winner. From the moment I arrived, everything felt easy and welcoming. The rooftop pool is an absolute highlight---so relaxing and chill, perfect for unwinding after a long day. Whether you're soaking up the sun or enjoying the evening breeze, it's a vibe.

 The à la carte menu is surprisingly affordable and seriously delicious. I'd even say it outshines some of the so-called delicacy restaurants in town. If you're here, do yourself a favor and try the stingray hotpot---it's rich, flavorful, and unforgettable. 

 Cocktails are tasty and budget-friendly, and the staff really elevate the experience. They're super helpful, always ready with great suggestions, and genuinely kind. I especially appreciated how the receptionists respected customer privacy---something you don't always get but makes a big difference.

 Bonus perks: free mini bar and complimentary laundry service. It's the little things that make a stay feel special, and this hotel nails it.

Overall, this place is exceptional to me. Great value, great vibes, and great people. I'll definitely be coming back.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: tất cả đều tốt trừ cô tiếp tân
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Mr/Mrs Thanh,

Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian để cho chúng tôi biết cảm nhận của quý khách về thời gian ở tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. Tôi rất tiếc vì thời gian quý khách ở tại khách sạn đã không đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của quý khách; hãy cho phép tôi bày tỏ lời xin lỗi chân thành nhất của mình.

Tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vũng Tàu chúng tôi nỗ lực để đem lại một trải nghiệm về dịch vụ vượt trội cho mọi khách hàng; do đó ý kiến phản hồi của quý khách có ý nghĩa vô cùng quan trọng đối với chúng tôi. Quý khách hãy tin tưởng rằng chúng tôi đang áp dụng những biện pháp thích hợp để giải quyết vấn đề và không để lặp lại trong tương lai.

Chúng tôi đánh giá cao việc quý khách đã chia sẻ với chúng tôi những điều mà quý khách chưa thấy hài lòng và thực sự hy vọng quý khách sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội để phục vụ quý khách tốt hơn trong tương lai gần.

Trân trọng,
Bộ phận chăm sóc khách hàng Oyster Bay Hotel Vũng Tàu

Mọi thứ đều gần như hoàn hảo nhưng có 2 chi tiết ảnh hưởng lớn đến trải nghiệm 
1. Họng gió máy lạnh thổi thẳng vào giường ngủ, khiến ngủ không ngon và đau họng. Tôi đã ở phòng dạng này 2 lần và lần nào cũng bị
2. Bồn tắm rất chill nhưng lại không có nắp để ngăn nước xả nên không thể ngâm bồn. Và khi đã ở trong nhà tắm rồi sẽ rất ngại gọi lễ tân để mang đồ lên

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn mới, sạch sẽ, decor đẹp, vị trí ko gần bãi biển, nhưng gần bãi sau để ngắm cảnh
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách hàng,
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý Khách đã dành thời gian quý báu của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. Khách Sạn rất vui mừng khi biết Quý Khách đã có một kỳ nghỉ / chuyến công tác tuyệt vời cùng Gia Đình, Bạn Bè và Người Thân.
Những phản hồi tích cực của Quý Khách chính là nguồn động lực to lớn để toàn thể đội ngũ nhân viên của Khách Sạn tiếp tục duy trì và mang đến chất lượng dịch vụ xuất sắc hơn nữa. Khách Sạn rất mong sớm có cơ hội được chào đón Quý Khách quay trở lại trong tương lai gần.
Trân trọng !

sample_comments.title: I had a good time. Hotel location is a bit @ss
sample_comments.text:
Like the title said. I had a good time. Room is clean, bed is very nice, view is spectacular. Hotel location is a bit dulled, it's situated on the very few coastal roads that don't have beach-front view. You will still see the ocean from your balcony. Lots of restaurants nearby. If you like to hike, there are mountains nearby. Ask the local for directions though because it can get confusing to navigate.

Overall, great stay & friendly staff. I think for the price I got, it's very worth it.

sample_comments.title: The hotel is fairly okay.
sample_comments.text:
Advantages: The location is convenient and beautiful, the price on Agoda is good, the amenities are comfortable, the room is spacious, there is ample parking, and the staff is pleasant. The breakfast is decent and you can sit comfortably. Bottled water and soft drinks in the fridge are free.

Disadvantages: The hotel has a very strange room numbering system; the same room number is divided into M for mountain and S for sea, and the elevator has different numbering which can be confusing. The bed and pillows are uncomfortable; the pillows are quite high and the fabric is too stiff. The ceiling-mounted air conditioner is difficult to control, making some areas too cold and others too hot.

sample_comments.title: Location a bit far from city

sample_comments.title: Một khách sạn tốt
sample_comments.text:
Điểm mạnh của khách sạn là nhân viên cực kỳ thân thiện. bữa ăn sáng ngon, đa dạng.

Cần cải thiện về mặt nhà tắm. Không có chiếc móc treo đồ nào trong nhà tắm cả ngoài giá để khăn tắm. Bồn tắm thoải mái nhưng không có thiết bị hỗ trợ cho người tắm đứng như giá đỡ vòi sen, màn che để khi đứng tắm ko văng nước ra xung quanh. Màn che ngăn cách phòng tắm với phòng ngủ ko kín đáo, dù vợ chồng, cặp đôi cũng ko phải ai cũng cảm thấy thoải mái khi nhìn thấy nhau sử dụng phòng tắm, toilet :(
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian để cho chúng tôi biết cảm nhận của quý khách về thời gian ở tại Oyster Bay Vung Tau. Tôi xin lỗi vì thời gian quý khách ở tại khách sạn đã không đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của quý khách; hãy cho phép tôi bày tỏ lời xin lỗi chân thành nhất của mình.

Tại Oyster Bay Vung Tau, chúng tôi nỗ lực để đem lại một trải nghiệm về dịch vụ vượt trội cho mọi khách hàng; do đó ý kiến phản hồi của quý khách có ý nghĩa vô cùng quan trọng đối với chúng tôi. Quý khách hãy tin tưởng rằng chúng tôi đang áp dụng những biện pháp thích hợp để giải quyết vấn đề và không để lặp lại trong tương lai.

Chúng tôi đánh giá cao việc quý khách đã chia sẻ với chúng tôi những điều mà quý khách chưa thấy hài lòng và thực sự hy vọng quý khách sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội để phục vụ quý khách tốt hơn trong tương lai gần.

Trân trọng,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.title: The reception is rude
sample_comments.text:
Good location
All staff in all departments from room service, security, restaurant, laundry, housekeeping are very very good, friendly and helpful
Rooms are also very good
ONLY THE RECEPTIONIST treats customers very badly. Answer without even looking at the customer's face. Not even listening to what the customer says to them. They treat us like we are begging to stay and I can see the same with other customers. Understand that this is peak time but this is not the way.
I recommend this place because of the room and other staff. The reception is really bad.
I asked to book a meeting room, the receptionist asked me to wait for her manager who was busy talking to someone on the phone without informing him that I was waiting, and I was really angry.
You should review because it is the face of the hotel, A FRONT DESK BUT YOUR SERVICE IS NOT AS GOOD AS THE BACK OF HOUSE DEPARTMENT.
-----------------
Vị trí tốt
Tất cả nhân viên ở tất cả các bộ phận từ dịch vụ phòng, an ninh, nhà hàng, giặt là, dọn phòng đều rất rất tốt, thân thiện và hữu ích
Phòng cũng rất tốt
CHỈ CÓ NHÂN VIÊN LỄ TÂN đối xử với khách hàng rất tệ. Trả lời thậm chí không nhìn vào mặt khách hàng. Thậm chí không lắng nghe những gì khách hàng nói với họ. Họ đối xử với chúng tôi như thể chúng tôi cầu xin được ở lại và tôi cũng có thể thấy điều tương tự ở những khách hàng khác. Hiểu rằng đây là thời điểm cao điểm nhưng đây không phải là cách.
Tôi giới thiệu nơi này vì phòng và các nhân viên khác. Lễ tân thực sự tệ.
Tôi yêu cầu đặt phòng họp, lễ tân yêu cầu tôi đợi quản lý của cô ấy đang bận nói chuyện điện thoại với ai đó mà không thông báo với anh ta rằng tôi đang đợi, và tôi thực sự tức giận.
Nên xem lại vì đó là bộ mặt của khách sạn, MỘT QUẦY LỄ TÂN NHƯNG DỊCH VỤ CỦA BẠN KHÔNG TỐT BẰNG PHÍA CÁC BỘ PHẬN KHÁC

It is always a pleasure to receive positive feedback. I will share your comments with our team. I am sure that this feedback will serve as an encouragement to all of our staff as we strive to continuously improve the quality of our services.

Thank you again for sharing your experience, and we hope your next visit will be as pleasant as the previous one.

Sincerely,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.title: Summer Holiday season
sample_comments.text:
Clean and new room. Big bed, room has all you need, Garden view but you can see mountain and sea by standing at balcony.
 Breakfast with sea view made my day! Basic daily meals. 
Location is not convenient for who like to go to the beach at backside, nearby beach has rocks not for kids. 
Staff friendly, I and family were enjoyed!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Mrs Jouhra,

Thank you for choosing Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau and for taking the time to review our services.

I will share your feedback with my team. I am confident that your comments will serve as motivation and encouragement for our entire staff, as we are continuously striving to enhance the quality of our services.

sample_comments.title: Worth the money
sample_comments.text:
Advantages: New resort, modern youthful style, beautiful location and scenery. My room had a view of both the mountains and the sea. Good staff. The resort even allowed me to check in early at 10:30 AM. The rooftop pool is lovely with a great view. The bar is beautiful. Breakfast is relatively diverse and decent. Good price compared to the general market.

Needs improvement: The hot water in the bathroom is a bit slow. Occasionally, there is a smell in the lobby and elevator. The pool water is a bit cold. In the evening, the bar does not play music and has a loud party, which makes it difficult for solo guests like me to relax.

Next time I will return with my family.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Nice and clean. Although the single rooms will only have partial view of the ocean from the balcony, not front view. Everything in the room is brand new. We would stay here again!
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued customers,
Thank you very much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your experience at Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us.
Your positive feedback is a great motivation for our entire team to continue delivering exceptional service. We look forward to the pleasure of welcoming you back in the near future.
Best regards !

sample_comments.title: Travel for the Death Anniversary of Hùng Kings 2026
sample_comments.text: I stayed for 2 nights during the holiday, and because I booked early, the price was reasonable. The room was large, clean, and nicely arranged. However, the breakfast buffet had very few items. Overall, everything was fine considering the cost.
sample_comments.response: Kính gửi Quý khách hàng, Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý Khách đã dành thời gian quý báu của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. Khách Sạn rất lấy làm tiếc khi biết Quý Khách đã có một kỳ nghỉ chưa được trọn vẹn. Khách sạn ghi nhận đóng góp ý kiến từ Quý khách và sẽ kiểm tra/điều chỉnh để dịch vụ ngày một hoàn thiện hơn. Những phản hồi tích cực của Quý Khách chính là nguồn động lực to lớn để toàn thể đội ngũ nhân viên của Khách Sạn tiếp tục duy trì và mang đến chất lượng dịch vụ xuất sắc hơn nữa. Khách Sạn rất mong sớm có cơ hội được chào đón Quý Khách quay trở lại trong tương lai gần. Trân trọng !

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Overall, everything was relatively good, the hotel location near the beach was convenient for swimming, the staff were very enthusiastic and supportive, even allowing me to check in two hours early and check out one hour late. I was very satisfied with the service, especially from the receptionists on April 15th, who were truly wonderful and provided great assistance, thank you. The hotel room was clean, fully equipped with necessary supplies, and the towels did not have a sour smell like at other hotels I have stayed at (even though those hotels were much more expensive and upscale). Additionally, the hotel had a very nice view. The breakfast buffet was very delicious. HOWEVER, I was quite dissatisfied with the woman at the rice noodle station; a few times prior, her attitude was not as friendly as the other staff but still acceptable, but this time her demeanor was quite unpleasant. I don't know if something was bothering her, but she always appeared annoyed, did not speak or smile, and when I asked her to help me with a bowl of rice noodles and blanch some vegetables, she glared at me and showed her displeasure. The rest of the staff were very good, and I was very satisfied. The hotel bathroom should install a water curtain for the bathtub to prevent water from splashing outside.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional hotel!
sample_comments.text: We had originally booked another accommodation but there was a miscommunication and it got cancelled, thus we ended up at Oyster Bay Hotel and we were so glad we did! It is a beautiful new hotel with a lovely rooftop pool and restaurant. The staff are absolutely lovely and the rooms were thoroughly cleaned every day. The food in the restaurant was so good that we didn't want to go anywhere else. They had nice mountain bikes/scooters for rent, for when you wanted to wander. We gave the location a four only because it is not close to a beach, although we enjoyed being a little removed from the busiest area. We would stay again and highly recommend this hotel!

sample_comments.title: Fairly okay.
sample_comments.text: The room price for booking in July is reasonable, but upon arrival, I didn't see any staff to help carry my luggage or guide me to the check-in counter! When I reached the check-in counter, my friend and I waited without being offered a welcome drink, we had to remind them before they brought it out! The room itself was very nice. The amenities were also good; the room I booked had a bathtub but no standing shower, and it was clean. The only drawback! There were three elevators. It took a long time to wait, and when we went to have breakfast on the weekend, it was super crowded with little food. But the food wasn't too bad after all, it's just that the elevator wait was too long. Hicccc. I would stay again and also consider having breakfast outside!

sample_comments.title: KS has a wonderful sea view.
sample_comments.text: The new hotel is comfortable, with delicious breakfast and a breezy sea view. For the first time, I saw a hotel offering two extra cans of soda for guests, in addition to two bottles of water. Not to mention, there are always welcome drinks available in the lobby, and staff members even come to offer drinks. It may not cost much, but it's very professional and classy. The small pool is clean and has a beautiful view. Almost all the staff are friendly and always smiling. The security guards are very attentive, helping guests cross the street and guiding them all the way to their vehicles before heading back. On weekends, the restaurant and pool can be a bit crowded, but the serving staff remains cheerful, especially the female bartender who is extremely friendly with children, even going as far as to cover them with towels. The male staff member at the pool, who is slightly chubby, is always cheerful and smiling. The only exception is the thin male staff member who seems a bit grumpy. The hotel has a conference room that hosts karaoke events, which can be a bit noisy, but they don't sing late, so it's not a major issue. There are a few coffee shops and a decent beach-view buffet restaurant around the hotel, but other than that, the area is quite quiet, and you have to walk a bit to reach the beach. If you prefer a quiet, polite, and comfortable resort-style stay, then this hotel is a great choice. I rate it 99 out of 100 points.

sample_comments.title: The hotel is clean, attentive, and worth the money.
sample_comments.text:
The new hotel has very good facilities. They offer early check-in assistance. The staff is attentive, from the reception to the bell staff and everyone else. The infinity pool has an area for children, located on the rooftop, providing a beautiful sea view, and the buffet dining area is on a similar floor. There is a welcome drink upon check-in, and the room provides free tea, coffee, and a minibar (2 bottles of water + 2 soft drinks). The bedding is warm, comfortable, and clean, the air conditioning is quiet, and the room is brand new and tidy, with new bathroom fixtures and quick hot water. Hand soap, shampoo, and body wash are provided in large containers for guests to use as needed. 

The downside is that the room only has warm yellow lights, and there is only a mirror in the bathroom; there is no mirror at the desk outside, which can be inconvenient for those wanting to apply makeup. Additionally, there is only one small trash can in the bathroom. Moreover, since the hotel is far from the center, it takes a bit more time to travel, but the upside is that it's quiet at night, unlike hotels in the city center.

Regarding breakfast, the staff knows that the breakfast area is not very large, so they politely explain to checking-in guests about peak hours to keep them informed. My family went down at 7 AM, and it wasn't too crowded; breakfast was quick and easy. The buffet includes pho, bread with beef stew, or fried eggs, ham, sausage, etc., porridge with salted eggs and shrimp, etc., tapioca dumplings, and salad (highly recommended, fresh vegetables, delicious, with 3-4 types of dressing to choose from); in addition, beverages include brewed coffee, tea, detox lemon water, and watermelon juice; for dessert, there are fresh fruits and pastries. For my family, this breakfast buffet is great. 

A staff member even came to ask about the guests' stay to see how they could improve. Check-out was also quick. Next time I come, I will still choose this hotel.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms.Phuong,

Khách sạn Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu rất vinh dự được tiếp đón gia đình quý khách. Chúng tôi luôn cố gắng để phòng, dịch vụ, và thức ăn luôn có chất lượng cao nhất, mang lại sự hài lòng cho quý khách trong thời gian lưu trú tại đây.

sample_comments.title: Traveling to Vung Tau 3 days 2 nights at Oyster Bay.
sample_comments.text: We found out about the hotel through TikTok, and I saw quite a few people recommending it, so we decided to experience it. We found this experience very worthwhile. Everything was very neat. The room was clean and equipped, although the space was a bit small, but that was enough for me, with a view of the sea + mountains. There was a time in the afternoon when we were sleeping and the room next door had someone come in to fix something, so it was quite noisy. We called the front desk for help, and they apologized and offered us 2 free drinks. I was quite surprised by the hotel's breakfast buffet; I also researched and found out that everyone praised the buffet as quite delicious and flavorful. Luckily, that turned out to be true; the food was diverse, with moderate flavors. This was the most impressive aspect of the hotel for me. Note that for the room category you choose on Agoda, you should ask the hotel beforehand about which floors it could be on! It's a pity that there are no convenience stores near the hotel; I found on Google Maps that the nearest one is over 1 km away. But next time I visit Vung Tau, I will choose to experience the services of Oyster Bay again; everyone has different experiences. So don't hesitate and give it a try!

sample_comments.title: Great
sample_comments.text: A wonderful vacation here. This accommodation is truly worth it with its ideal location, cleanliness, and friendly staff. The bathroom is equipped with very good hot water, along with strong Wi-Fi that helps connect easily. Although the amenities could be improved a bit, overall it still provides a comfortable and relaxing experience. Very satisfied and will definitely return if given the chance.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào Quý khách, 
Chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú cùng Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu và dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm dịch vụ tại Khách sạn.
Ban quản lý và toàn thể nhân viên Khách sạn rất vui khi những dịch vụ tại Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu đã đáp ứng được sự kỳ vọng của Quý khách. 
Chúng tôi rất vui mừng và vinh dự khi được chia sẻ những nhận xét của Quý khách đến các bạn nhân viên, chúng tôi sẽ luôn cố gắng không ngừng để nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.
Rất mong sẽ lại có cơ hội để được chào đón Quý khách và gia đình quay trở lại trong thời gian sớm nhất.
Trân trọng,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.title: A memorable vacation.
sample_comments.text: I arrived to check in on time, the check-in was quite quick, and I received a room with a very nice view. The space in the room was great, and especially, the bed was incredibly comfortable. The bathroom had a quite large bathtub, but a downside for those who are a bit shy is that there is a glass door that directly looks into the bedroom, and the curtain is a bit thin. On the plus side, the space was airy, the rooftop had a very beautiful infinity pool. The location is not near a bustling area, which is suitable for those who don't like the crowd; overall, I give it a score of 10 out of 10.
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian đánh giá cho Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu !

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách đã có trải nghiệm thú vị tại Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu. Sự hài lòng của Quý khách hàng là động lực lớn nhất để chúng tôi không ngừng cải thiện và cung cấp dịch vụ tốt nhất có thể.

Chúng tôi thực sự trân trọng những lời đánh giá tích cực từ Quý khách và mong sớm được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong tương lai!

Trân trọng,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.title: Worth the money, manage high expectations
sample_comments.text:
I got a good price for a standard room. Everything is worth the price. 
Advantages: 
+ The location is close to Ganh Hao, Ulala farm, and Beach stops, so it doesn't feel too empty. 
+ The rooms have a sea view, are new, and clean in every detail. 
+ The staff is enthusiastic and supportive. 
Aside from these points, 
- The parking for cars is limited, but fortunately, there is a guard to help. 
- The buffet dining area is a bit small. 
- Although it is a high-end location, the decoration is average, without many fancy elements.

sample_comments.title: Oyster Bay Short Stay
sample_comments.text: Stayed for 1 night at the Oyster Bay and only spent 10hrs in the hotel, however it was enough time to appreciate the quiet location with a great view out front, the staff and limited facilities on site. The room was spotless, spacious, reasonably well appointed with good AC. The hotel is a short drive from the main town and coastal restaurants and bars with local transport as well as ride hailing options gor moving around. Overall it was a short and enjoyable overnight stay.

sample_comments.title: New hotel
sample_comments.text: Very nice place, good breakfast, disappointed no sauna. Everything else was very nice.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: We spent vacation time in Vung Tau every year. This hotel is new, excellent breakfast, fantastic staff, clean room and the daily rate is reasonable..

sample_comments.title: very new hotel
sample_comments.text: the location is pretty far from the city center

sample_comments.title: Khách sạn dịch vụ tốt
sample_comments.text: Dịch vụ tốt,nhân viên thân thiện, phòng ốc mới và sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện ích. Tiếc chút là khách sạn không gần biển lắm, đi xe 7 phút. Dù sao cũng ok so với tầm giá.

sample_comments.title: Amazing stay at Oyster Bay Vung tau
sample_comments.text: My boyfriend and I stayed at Oyster Bay Vung Tau for 2 nights and it was amazing. Once we entered the hotel, we were greeted with such friendly and polite staffs. Made everything easy and they were so helpful and respectful. From the receptionist, to the bellman to the security and the staffs at the pool, everyone was lovely. The room was so clean, no smell, bathroom was clean ( a little small ) but it was clean and I enjoyed every minute at the stay. Thank you Oyster Bay staffs for your accomodating service.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Phòng sạch, nhân viên thân thiện nhiệt tình.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: new facility

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel - very polite staff
sample_comments.text: Thank you to the staff for the warmth and friendliness you have shown my family. Wishing the hotel and all the staff the best. Although the power outage schedule for the entire city of Vung Tau is from 6 AM to 6 PM, the hotel still ensures everything for guests as usual.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Great hotel. Nice and clean. Everything is new and so comfortable.

sample_comments.title: EVALUATING SERVICE QUALITY
sample_comments.text: The first time experiencing Oyster Bay left many good impressions. The room was beautiful and clean, and the staff were very helpful!! It's worth experiencing.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Need a car or motorbike or use taxis for longer stay to access swimming beach

sample_comments.title: Very good!
sample_comments.text: New hotel, beautiful rooms, nice interiors, great view, decent breakfast, friendly and enthusiastic staff. The only downside is that to go swimming at the beach, you have to go back to the front beach as there is no bathing area in front of the hotel.

sample_comments.title: Great for the price
sample_comments.text: If you're not prefer to stay right next to the sandy beach, then Oyster Bay might be just right. Can't complain about anything. Good facilities, nice staffs and great room view.

sample_comments.title: Satisfied
sample_comments.text: The hotel is newly built, so the interior is very new, the rooms are clean, and the staff is very friendly and dedicated. Additionally, breakfast is very delicious, the chicken pho is well-cooked with tender chicken and not at all soggy, and the sticky rice is also very tasty. My child really liked the soup, but it was a bit watery, so adding a bit more topping would be better. We booked a room without a sea view, but we could still see the sea. The check-in process was very nice, the pool is a bit small, but the little kids had a lot of fun playing there, and the staff kept a close watch, so parents felt very at ease. However, it would be better to have an extra trash bin in the living room.

sample_comments.title: Wrong offer
sample_comments.text:
I booked family room with 3 beds (1 king, 1 queen, 1 single) as shown on Agoda offer. But when I checked in at the hotel, we only got family room with 2 beds. I did spoke to the hotel, and they said this issue is from Agoda provided, which Agoda is responsible for misleading information at their site. 
Overall the hotel was good, cleanliness, quiet, friendly staffs. Would recommend to stay here
sample_comments.response:

Customer Service Department

sample_comments.title: Short vacation
sample_comments.text: I booked a room on Agoda, the price is very reasonable, the facilities are new, the room is clean, the check-in and check-out are very fast, the staff here are very enthusiastic and friendly, always greeting my family. The location on Tran Phu Street has many cafes with beautiful ocean views; however, dining and beach access are a bit far. On weekends, Tran Phu Street can easily get congested. The infinity pool is beautiful but a bit small if it's crowded during the weekend, and the buffet is delicious.

sample_comments.title: The hotel is clean, comfortable, and high-rise.
sample_comments.text: This is my second stay, the room is clean, comfortable, cool, and has a high floor with a beautiful sea view. This time I booked a high floor through the app, but the hotel didn't note it, so I was assigned a lower floor. When I arrived, the lovely receptionist quickly helped me change my room. sample_comments.title: Great experience and very convenient.
sample_comments.text: The accommodation is conveniently located, clean, and has friendly staff, creating a comfortable feeling from the very first moment. Modern amenities with hot water and clean bathrooms contribute to a better night's sleep. The breakfast is varied and close to shopping areas, making it well worth the cost.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text:
Oyster Bay Hotel offers a quite complete experience although there are a few points to consider.

The first impression I had was the extremely enthusiastic, friendly, and always cheerful staff. From check-in to throughout my stay, whenever I needed assistance, they responded quickly and handled everything very carefully, creating a very pleasant feeling.

Overall, the hotel has a luxurious, modern design and is kept very clean. The common areas are spacious, aesthetically invested, making it look quite "classy," suitable for relaxation or taking great photos.

The rooms are bright, receiving natural light, with nice views (depending on the room, you can see the sea or the surrounding scenery). The furnishings are fully equipped, especially with a smart TV that can access YouTube, making it great to chill in the evenings.

A convenient point is that right next to the hotel, there is a small grocery store, which is quite handy for buying snacks without having to go far.

Breakfast here is basic, not too special but not bad either - good enough to fuel energy for a new day.

The point I like the most is definitely the pool. The pool is clean, with a beautiful view, especially in the evening while watching the sunset, it feels very "chill," quite ideal for relaxing or taking photos.

However, the biggest downside is that the hotel is quite far from the center, making it a bit inconvenient to explore many dining or entertainment spots. It is more suitable for those who want a quiet retreat away from the hustle and bustle.

sample_comments.title: Excellent 2 Weeks !!
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at Oyster Bay for 2 weeks and loved every day. 

Using Grab to get into the busier areas of the city, it was relaxing to come "home" to the hotel with a beautiful view of the ocean and mountainside.

Breakfast was standard and reasonable. We went around 9:00 and never had a problem finding a table. Food was cleared away at 10, but many people sat and continued eating until 10:30.

After breakfast we went to the pool every day -- weekdays were quiet, and the weekends were busy with kids having fun in the pool. Great to hear their laughter.

There are many coffee shops and a few restaurants within easy walking distance, but we usually took Grab to get to restaurants we found and went back to. 

We'll stay at Oyster Bay again!!

Upon check out they held our luggage so we could explore more. Liked this hotel that we booked another night and this time the apartment Mountain View side was amazing. Very quiet and spacious. Food delicious. Will visit again in future.

sample_comments.title: Fantastic!
sample_comments.text: I was a little concerned because some reviews said there were no showers in the bathrooms, but my room had a very nice rainfall shower. Apparently some rooms have only a bathtub, but no shower. Just make sure a shower is listed in the amenities before you book. As for everything else: Perfect! All the staff are friendly, polite and professional with real smiles. The room was squeaky clean and I slept perfectly in the bed (not too firm, not too soft). And for those of you afraid of bugs, there were zero. I even checked the mattress under the sheets. Mattress was pristine! Sheets blinding white without a mark or stray hair. View was perfect and thermostat controlled AC worked great. The restaurant/bar on the roof is pricier than local fare, but WORTH IT for the view alone! Plus the food was delicious and the cocktails strong! Restaurant and breakfast staff service was excellent. Breakfast selection was big without being overwhelming. Pool is kept squeaky clean and it is way nicer than it looks in the photos. An incredible stay overall. I'll be back!

sample_comments.title: A very wonderful experience.
sample_comments.text: My family has 2 adults and 1 child who is 18 months old, and this is our first time staying here. We are very satisfied with both the staff and the rooms. The room is very spacious, clean, and smells good without any strange odors. The hotel is new, so everything is in great condition. The bed is high, soft, and clean. My son just got here and jumped on the bed, rolling around happily. The breakfast buffet has quite a variety of dishes. You can choose according to your taste; for me, who is quite picky, I would rate it 8.5/10. The swimming pool is clean. The staff is friendly and enthusiastic. The parking lot is quite decent, though the parking spaces are a bit small, so with a 7-seat car, it's a little tight.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful experience at Oyster Bay
sample_comments.text:
- When we went, it was very crowded, check-in is at 3 PM, but when we arrived around 2 PM, the receptionist assisted in finding a room ready for us to check in early.
- The room is beautiful and clean, with a view of the sea and mountains.
- The highlight is the balcony overlooking the sea and the infinity pool, perfect for taking pictures.
- One area for improvement is the breakfast buffet; the food variety is still limited, not many options to choose from.
- The room's workspace lacks a makeup mirror on the desk, which is a bit inconvenient for girls who want to do their makeup and have to go back to the bathroom.
When we went, the room rate was also reasonable; overall, at this price level in OysterBay, it's hard to find any faults.

The complete amenities make the trip more comfortable, especially the swimming pool and beautiful scenery. The sleep is also very good, providing a relaxing feeling after days of exploration. If you are looking for a place to relax and enjoy, this is the perfect choice.
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Chúng tôi vô cùng biết ơn vì những ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách liên quan tới thời gian quý khách nghỉ tại Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu. Mọi ý kiến phản hồi tích cực đều mang lại niềm vui cho chúng tôi.

Tôi sẽ chia sẻ ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách với đội ngũ nhân viên của mình. Tôi chắc chắn rằng ý kiến phản hồi này sẽ là nguồn động viên khích lệ đối với toàn bộ tập thể nhân viên của chúng tôi bởi chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực không ngừng nâng cấp chất lượng các dịch vụ của mình.

Cảm ơn quý khách một lần nữa vì đã chia sẻ cảm nhận của quý khách và chúng tôi hy vọng chuyến đi lần tới của quý khách cũng sẽ dễ chịu như các chuyến đi trước.

Trân trọng,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.title: Amazing stay with stunning rooftop view
sample_comments.text: The building is newly built, so the facilities are very nice and clean. The staffs are very polite and helpful. The breakfast buffet was great, and a table with a direct view of the sea from 16th floors makes your morning even better. The hotel is far from the nearest shore, not recommended If you want to walk. The hotel is quiet after 2200, a good place to rest. Would recommend to friends and family, and I'll be coming back on my next visit.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for choosing us for your short getaway in Vung Tau and especially for your kind review! The entire team is delighted to hear that you had an enjoyable time with us here!

Please rest assured we all look forward to having you back with us again soon.

Best Regards,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.title: Great Stay! Will Definitely Return!
sample_comments.text:
I had a wonderful stay at this hotel! Everything was perfect---from the clean and well-maintained facilities to the friendly and helpful staff, including the security team and housekeeping. The pool was fantastic, very clean and well-kept, making it a great spot to relax. The hotel also offers a beautiful view, which made my stay even more enjoyable.

The buffet breakfast was average, nothing too special but still decent. My only small disappointment was that I had requested a higher-floor room but didn't get one. However, this didn't affect my overall experience too much.

Despite that, I really enjoyed my stay and will definitely come back. Highly recommend this hotel!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your wonderful review!

We are delighted to hear that you had an enjoyable experience at Oyster Bay Vung Tau. Your satisfaction is our greatest motivation to continuously improve and provide the best service possible.

We truly appreciate your kind words and look forward to welcoming you back soon!

Best Regards,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn view đẹp , yên tĩnh , nhân viên thân thiện , sẽ quay lại ngày gần nhất
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian đánh giá cho Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu !

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách đã có trải nghiệm thú vị tại Oyster Bay Vũng Tàu. Sự hài lòng của Quý khách hàng là động lực lớn nhất để chúng tôi không ngừng cải thiện và cung cấp dịch vụ tốt nhất có thể.

Chúng tôi thực sự trân trọng những lời đánh giá tích cực từ Quý khách và mong sớm được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong tương lai.

Trân trọng,
Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau Team

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: I went during the Tet holiday, although there were many guests, the receptionists, security, housekeeping staff, and managers were all very lovely and attentive. The room was clean, and when it comes to service, I rate it 10/10. I will definitely return here for my next trips to Vung Tau. As for the price, I find it suitable for the quality of service, compared to some hotels of that standard in Vung Tau, it might even be cheaper. This is just my experience, and I'm not comparing with anyone else.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful
sample_comments.text:
Staff is numerous, enthusiastic, and lovely, meeting the standard of a 4-star hotel. 
The location is close to several chill cafes. 
The room is spacious with a large balcony. 
The breakfast buffet is delicious, but you need to time it right, or it can get very crowded; the view of the pool and buffet area is stunning. 
Cons: the parking space is small and inconvenient to access, the bathroom curtain is thin, allowing visibility into the bathroom while someone is using it or showering, basically, you can see everything. 
The experience exceeded expectations, deserving of 5 stars.
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách hàng,
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý Khách đã dành thời gian quý báu của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. Khách Sạn rất vui mừng khi biết Quý Khách đã có một kỳ nghỉ / chuyến công tác tuyệt vời cùng Gia Đình, Bạn Bè và Người Thân.
Những phản hồi tích cực của Quý Khách chính là nguồn động lực to lớn để toàn thể đội ngũ nhân viên của Khách Sạn tiếp tục duy trì và mang đến chất lượng dịch vụ xuất sắc hơn nữa. Khách Sạn rất mong sớm có cơ hội được chào đón Quý Khách quay trở lại trong tương lai gần.
Trân trọng !

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The newly built hotel has very new and clean rooms. Upon entering, there are friendly staff to assist with luggage, offer drinks, and check-in/check-out is done in just 2 minutes. I booked for Saturday and Sunday, but it wasn't too crowded, so I didn't have to wait for the elevator at all. The hotel offers free overnight parking, and breakfast is quite good. My husband and I have stayed in many places, but this is the first time we've found pho at a hotel to be this delicious; it's really good, with rich broth, and other dishes are also highly rated. One small suggestion is that the hotel should have a trash bin in the room, and the bathroom curtain is a bit thin, so you can see inside from outside. Otherwise, everything is great, I would rate it 9.5/10. I definitely plan to come back! :D

sample_comments.title: One night getaway from HCMC
sample_comments.text: Oyster Bay is a lovely cosy place to stay in Vung Tàu. The facilities are brand new and well maintained. The staff are the definition of hospitality and care. I'll be definitely coming back. I'd suggest though keeping music volume around the pool a bit down and prompt cleaning under the tables in the restaurant area throughout breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Trải nghiệm tốt, mình sẽ quay lại
sample_comments.text: phòng sạch, staff nhiệt tình và rất thân thiện. buffet sáng k quá nhiều món nhưng thay đổi hàng ngày và vị ổn định. mình sẽ quay lại.

sample_comments.title: Nice view & fantastic hotel
sample_comments.text: We will come back again. This was very lovely trip. The hotel is very new and so clean. The location is great, and Seaview room is fantastic.

sample_comments.title: Nice 4* hotel
sample_comments.text: Great overall. The best thing is the staffs are so friendly and helpful. The morning buffet is acceptable.

sample_comments.title: Great experience
sample_comments.text:
I had an amazing stay at OYSTER BAY, where everything exceeded my expectations. The staff were incredibly welcoming and ensured a smooth check-in process. My room was spacious, spotless, and offered a stunning view, with all the amenities I needed for a comfortable stay. The bed was very cozy, and the attention to detail in the room decor made it feel special.

The dining experience was exceptional, with a variety of delicious dishes and a great breakfast spread. The hotel's facilities, especially the pool and spa, were well-maintained and offered a relaxing retreat. Its location was convenient, making it easy to explore nearby attractions.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: New hotel with good conditions

sample_comments.title: Wonderful and noteworthy hotel.
sample_comments.text: This time I visited Vung Tau, I felt very happy and comfortable staying at Oyster. I was particularly impressed by the service of the staff here (dedicated - enthusiastic - lovely). I will return when I have the chance.

sample_comments.title: Super clean facility and great staff
sample_comments.text: I stayed in this hotel a couple day ago and I have to say it ways over my expectations. The facility is new and clean. The staffs are friendly and professional. I would recommend it to anyone who love to have a great vacation in Vung Tau.

sample_comments.title: New hotel
sample_comments.text: New, nice and clean. Very good customer service. Special Phat.

sample_comments.title: Amazing healing experience at Oyster Bay Vung Tau.
sample_comments.text:
The location is very convenient, close to the beach and easy to access famous tourist spots. The rooms are clean, airy, and beautifully decorated, creating a comfortable and cozy atmosphere.

The staff is very friendly, enthusiastic, and professional, always ready to assist throughout the stay. The breakfast is delicious with a variety of options.

The scenery here is very peaceful, ideal for relaxing and enjoying private space. I am very satisfied with the quality of service and will definitely return in the future.

sample_comments.title: The hotel is newly operational. The rooms are new, clean, and beautiful.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is newly built, with beautiful lighting outside. The staff are enthusiastic and dynamic. The parking area inside is spacious and clean. The rooms are new, tidy, and have a nice balcony view. The buffet has a variety of dishes, with many delicious Vietnamese options. The swimming pool is also large, overlooking the mountains and sea, great for photos, and there's a bar playing karaoke music. Suggestions for improvement: there should be a guard at the pool and better cleaning (when I used the men's restroom, it had a strong smell but I didn't see anyone cleaning). The curtain covering the glass wall of the restroom is a bit thin, allowing visibility into the restroom from the room. Everything else was happy. Good choice!

sample_comments.title: A wonderful holiday.
sample_comments.text: The hotel meets my services and amenities very well. The staff is attentive, polite, and professional; the breakfast is perfect in terms of variety and taste. The design of the hotel offers beautiful views for all room types. The lobby, hallways, and rooms are all bright and stylishly lit. The room amenities are lovely and quite complete (lacking a shower cap and a convenient trash can at the sofa table). The pool is modest but sufficient, and the rooftop bar meets all needs. There are enough spots for motorcycle parking, but car parking is a bit limited; however, the security staff is always attentive. Additionally, if possible, the hotel could provide more services or a stall for basic necessities at affordable prices (personal hygiene items, snacks, disposable raincoats, masks...), which would exceed expectations. Overall rating is very, very good, and I will always return whenever possible. Thank you.

sample_comments.title: 가격 대비 괜찮아요.
sample_comments.text: 가성비는 괜찮습니다만, 불편한 부분 몇가지 있습니다. 우선 로비 출입구가 계단으로 되어 있어, 여행 케리어를 들고 올라야 합니다. 로비 출입문은 아주 무거운 문을 당기고 들어가야 하는 불편함이 있습니다. 엘리에이터가 3개 인데 식당이 있는 16층으로 가는 것은 2개라서 조식 식사시에 사람이 많이 붐빕니다. 호텔이 중심에서 떨어져 있어 조용하긴 한데, 주변에 편의점이나 약국이 없는 것도 좀 불편하고요. 조식은 먹을 만 합니다. 객실이 크고, 침구류와 가구류가깨끗하고, 고급이라서 정말 마음에 들었습니다.

sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách hàng,
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý Khách đã dành thời gian quý báu của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. Khách Sạn rất vui mừng khi biết Quý Khách đã có một kỳ nghỉ / chuyến công tác tuyệt vời cùng Gia Đình, Bạn Bè và Người Thân.
Những phản hồi tích cực của Quý Khách chính là nguồn động lực to lớn để toàn thể đội ngũ nhân viên của Khách Sạn tiếp tục duy trì và mang đến chất lượng dịch vụ xuất sắc hơn nữa. Khách Sạn rất mong sớm có cơ hội được chào đón Quý Khách quay trở lại trong tương lai gần.
Trân trọng !

sample_comments.title: Tệ
sample_comments.text: Mình đặt phòng ksan giá cũng khá mắc, mình chọn loại phòng view biển, có yêu cầu ở phòng lầu cao & có hút thuốc. Tới nhận phòng thì cho mình ở lầu 2???, view bị che bởi cây phượng gần như không thấy được biển. Đến hôm sau trả phòng thì đòi phụ thu thêm 2 triệu rưỡi tiền phạt do phòng mình ở bị ám mùi thuốc, mặc dù chồng mình hút thuốc ở ngoài ban công và không hề có tàn thuốc gì trên sàn. Mình không đồng ý do lễ tân không nói rõ về điều khoản phạt lúc nhận phòng, thì lễ tân nói vậy tụi em hỗ trợ thu 500K thôi, mình cũng không đồng ý, sau đó bạn lễ tân kiểm tra phòng mình ở lần nữa và nói hỗ trợ thu mình 50% thôi là 300K?!? Mình thấy phiền phức kiểu muốn vòi tiền nên mình đồng ý thanh toán luôn. Trải nghiệm quá tệ cho một khách sạn giá khá mắc
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Mr/Mrs Ngọc,

Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian để cho chúng tôi biết cảm nhận của quý khách về thời gian ở tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vung Tau. Tôi rất tiếc vì thời gian quý khách ở tại khách sạn đã không đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của quý khách; hãy cho phép tôi bày tỏ lời xin lỗi chân thành nhất của mình.

Tại Oyster Bay Hotel Vũng Tàu chúng tôi nỗ lực để đem lại một trải nghiệm về dịch vụ vượt trội cho mọi khách hàng; do đó ý kiến phản hồi của quý khách có ý nghĩa vô cùng quan trọng đối với chúng tôi. Quý khách hãy tin tưởng rằng chúng tôi đang áp dụng những biện pháp thích hợp để giải quyết vấn đề và không để lặp lại trong tương lai.

Chúng tôi đánh giá cao việc quý khách đã chia sẻ với chúng tôi những điều mà quý khách chưa thấy hài lòng và thực sự hy vọng quý khách sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội để phục vụ quý khách tốt hơn trong tương lai gần.

Trân trọng,
Bộ phận chăm sóc khách hàng Oyster Bay Hotel Vũng Tàu

sample_comments.title: Acceptable

sample_comments.title: Dọn phòng chậm, fill đồ thiếu, cầu thang chậm, chỗ ăn sáng bé
sample_comments.text: Không có một cái khách sạn nào mà cả ngày không dọn phòng rồi đến 9h tối mới dọn phòng. Xong khi dọn thì fill khăn tắm, khăn mặt, khăn tay, bàn trải đánh răng thiếu tùm lum. Dọn phòng để đồ lại thì khăn không để ở chỗ để khăn mà lại để trong tủ quần áo nên lúc check out thì báo thiếu lung tung khăn. Khách sạn đông mà chỉ có 3 cái thang máy nên mỗi lần đi thang máy phải đợi 10 phút mới có thang. Chỗ ăn thì không có chỗ ngồi cho khách. Giá phòng cũng chẳng rẻ mà chất lượng thấp quá kém
